papers.title: Streck Cell-Free DNA BCT Tubes for cfDNA Preservation in Lung Squamous Cell Carcinoma
papers.access_route: not_available — research use only, not banked for external access
papers.notes: CONFIRMED NOT BANKED. Study used Streck BCT as collection method for a research protocol; specimens were processed and consumed for the study. No biobank infrastructure described. n=49 LUSC cases — not available for external sourcing.

papers.title: Shallow Whole-Genome Sequencing of cfDNA from Streck BCT Tubes in Lung Cancer
papers.access_route: not_available — research use only, not banked for external access
papers.notes: CONFIRMED NOT BANKED. 16 SCC cases collected in Streck BCT for sWGS research. Specimens processed for the study, not retained in biobank. Small n, no access route described.

notes: IMPOSSIBLE bundle. Confirmed through systematic literature search: no published biobank offers banked Streck BCT LUSC liquid biopsy specimens for external access. Both papers in scope describe research-use collections that were consumed in the study. Streck BCT is a collection tube technology; biobanks that use it as a collection method do not appear to advertise Streck-specific inventories in the literature. A sourcing agent should classify this bundle as BLOCKED with recommendation to contact large lung cancer biobanks (LCBB, SPORE programs) about collection protocol flexibility — they may be able to prospectively collect in Streck BCT but no banked inventory exists.
